summary: Iteration 73 - Programmatic SEO System Testing Complete. Backend 100% pass (25/25). Fixed TrendingProductPage.jsx bug (confidenceLabel used before declaration). All 7 parts verified.

fixed_bugs.issue: JavaScript error: 'confidenceLabel' was used in faqLd before it was declared, causing 'Something went wrong' error on product pages
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Moved confidenceLabel const declaration above faqLd object where it's referenced

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/public/seo/trending-today returns 200 with correct structure (title, products, count, date)
BACKEND: GET /api/public/seo/trending-this-week returns 200 with correct structure
BACKEND: GET /api/public/seo/trending-this-month returns 200 with correct structure
BACKEND: GET /api/public/seo/category/{slug} returns 200 with category, title, products
BACKEND: GET /api/public/seo/all-categories returns array with name, slug, count, avg_score
BACKEND: Invalid category slug returns 404
BACKEND: Sitemap includes /trending-products-today, /trending-products-this-week, /trending-products-this-month
BACKEND: Sitemap includes 19+ category pages (/category/{slug})
BACKEND: Product data has pricing for Offers schema
BACKEND: Product data has category for BreadcrumbList schema
BACKEND: Products have slug for internal linking
BACKEND: All endpoints return consistent data structures
FRONTEND: /trending-products-today page renders with breadcrumb, time period nav, category links, product grid
FRONTEND: /trending-products-this-week page renders correctly
FRONTEND: /trending-products-this-month page renders correctly
FRONTEND: /category/beauty page renders with category products and other category links
FRONTEND: Product page /trending/{slug} has Product JSON-LD schema
FRONTEND: Product page has BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema
FRONTEND: Product page has FAQ JSON-LD schema
FRONTEND: Product page has Market Opportunity section with pricing details
FRONTEND: Internal links present in footer (time periods, categories)
FRONTEND: Breadcrumb navigation visible on all SEO pages

verified_features.verification: /trending-products-today, /trending-products-this-week, /trending-products-this-month all render with 100 products, breadcrumbs, time period nav
/category/{slug} pages render with category-specific products, other category links, internal linking
Product pages now have Market Opportunity section with supplier cost, retail price, profit margin
Time period navigation, category links, and footer internal links present on all new pages
Sitemap at /api/sitemap.xml includes trending-products-today, trending-products-this-week, trending-products-this-month, and 19+ category pages
Product pages include Product JSON-LD, BreadcrumbList JSON-LD, and FAQ JSON-LD schemas
All API endpoints are cached (5-minute TTL), pages load quickly with proper lazy loading

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: TrendingProductPage.jsx had confidenceLabel used before declaration in faqLd object - classic JavaScript temporal dead zone issue
All new SEO endpoints properly cached with 5-minute TTL
Category pages correctly slugify category names and handle 404 for invalid slugs
Sitemap generator properly includes new static pages and category pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 tested the 7-part programmatic SEO system. Fixed bug in TrendingProductPage.jsx where confidenceLabel was used before declaration. All SEO pages working: /trending-products-today, /trending-products-this-week, /trending-products-this-month, /category/{slug}. Product pages now have Product, BreadcrumbList, FAQ JSON-LD schemas and Market Opportunity section. Sitemap includes all new pages.
